types.name: ROUNDING_FLOOR
types.description: Integer division or checked_div that truncates toward zero when computing shares, rewards, or token amounts.

types.name: ROUNDING_CEIL
types.description: Ceiling division applied to user-owed amounts (fee deduction, debt rounding, rent-exempt top-up).

types.name: MIXED_ROUNDING_DIRECTION
types.description: Floor and ceil used in the same deposit/withdraw or borrow/repay pair in a Solana vault or lending program.
markers: floor on mint and ceil on burn
asymmetric rounding between deposit.rs and withdraw.rs

types.name: PRECISION_TRUNCATION
types.description: Downcasting u128 to u64, i64 to i32, or Decimal to raw integer units that loses information.

types.name: MULT_BEFORE_DIV
types.description: a * b / c ordering in reward-per-share, fee, or share-price math without widening to u128.
markers: raw a * b / c on u64

types.name: CHECKED_ARITHMETIC_GAP
types.description: Mixing checked_* with raw +, -, *, /, or wrapping_* / saturating_* in the same flow.

types.name: ZERO_AMOUNT_PASSTHROUGH
types.description: Deposit, stake, swap, or claim instruction that accepts amount == 0 and still mutates state.

types.name: SIGNER_AUTHORITY
types.description: Instruction gated by Signer, has_one = authority, PDA authority match, or multisig vote.

types.name: NO_ACCESS_CONTROL
types.description: Public instruction handler that mutates state or moves lamports/tokens with no Signer or authority check.

types.name: GENESIS_BYPASS
types.description: Initialization-only path that runs once and sets program state.

types.name: PAUSE_GATE
types.description: Instruction gated by a paused/halted/emergency_stop flag stored in a config PDA.

types.name: LOOP_STORAGE_MUTATION
types.description: Loop body that mutates an account per iteration.

types.name: UNBOUNDED_ITERATION
types.description: Loop over remaining_accounts, a Vec<Pubkey>, or an AccountLoader range without a hard cap.
markers: for r in ctx.remaining_accounts.iter() with no length check
for p in state.queue.iter() where queue is user-appendable

types.name: READ_WRITE_GAP
types.description: Account field read, CPI executes, then the same field written or relied on without reload.

types.name: DELETE_IN_LOOP
types.description: swap_remove/remove from a Vec inside a PDA while iterating, or close_account inside a loop.

types.name: COUNTER_INCREMENT
types.description: Monotonic counter inside a PDA used as nonce, order id, or position id.

types.name: COLLECT_THEN_ITERATE
types.description: Snapshot a Vec from an account before iterating, to avoid mutable-borrow conflicts.

types.name: ORACLE_PRICE_DEP
types.description: Computation depends on Pyth, Switchboard, or in-program oracle feed.

types.name: ORACLE_STALENESS
types.description: Explicit staleness check on oracle publish_time vs Clock::get().unix_timestamp.

types.name: CPI
types.description: Any Cross-Program Invocation. Canonical cross-program bridge piece.

types.name: ACCOUNT_STATE_READ
types.description: Read of another program's account state (Solana has no RPC; all reads are passed-in accounts).

types.name: ORACLE_ERROR_SWALLOWED
types.description: Oracle load or price fetch that falls back to a default value, zero, or last-known price on error.

types.name: FIRST_DEPOSITOR_PATH
types.description: Branch when total_supply == 0 in an SPL-share vault.
markers: shares = amount when supply is zero

types.name: PROPORTIONAL_SHARE
types.description: SPL share mint proportional to deposit amount / total assets.
markers: mint_to CPI keyed to that computation
LP mint authority held by vault PDA

types.name: FEE_COMPUTATION
types.description: Fee computed as bps of a user amount, with optional protocol fee split.

types.name: SLIPPAGE_PROTECTION
types.description: User-supplied min_amount_out / max_amount_in passed in InstructionData.

types.name: PRICE_FROM_RESERVES
types.description: AMM spot price from on-chain token-account reserves.

types.name: PASSIVE_ORDER_GEN
types.description: Program-generated orders placed by crank (e.g., Phoenix seat market makers, DLMM bin liquidity).
markers: crank instruction places orders without a user signer

types.name: CLEARING_PRICE_SELECTION
types.description: Auction or batch clearing price inside a Solana order-book or auction program.

types.name: MINIMUM_SIZE_CHECK
types.description: Minimum order/deposit size enforced to prevent dust.

types.name: CANCEL_BEFORE_CREATE
types.description: Batch instruction that processes cancellations before new creations in the same tx or crank pass.

types.name: MULTI_HOP_CHAIN
types.description: Multi-hop swap route: output of hop N feeds hop N+1 via CPI.
markers: sequential CPI into multiple AMM programs

types.name: EARLY_RETURN_BRANCH
types.description: Conditional return Ok(()) that skips state updates (checkpoints, fee accrual, reward index bump).
markers: guard clause returning Ok(()) before invariant update

types.name: FUND_VERIFICATION
types.description: Assertion that a token account actually received the expected amount.

types.name: REFUND_CALCULATION
types.description: Computation of excess lamports / tokens returned to user after an operation.

types.name: MINT_AND_BURN
types.description: Mint or burn SPL / Token-2022 supply via CPI.

types.name: DUST_ACCUMULATION
types.description: Repeated floor rounding in a per-user loop that accumulates residual lamports in the vault PDA.
markers: floor in for user in users loop

types.name: SLOT_DISCRIMINATION
types.description: Logic that treats items created in the current Clock::slot differently from prior slots; also covers current-epoch vs prior-epoch logic.

types.name: MAKER_TAKER_SPLIT
types.description: Different fee rates based on order timing in a Solana orderbook (Phoenix, OpenBook, Zeta).

types.name: ORDER_ID_MANIPULATION
types.description: Packed encoding of price+sequence into a u128 order id for sort-order control (OpenBook-style).

types.name: INVARIANT_PRESERVATION
types.description: Explicit mathematical invariant assertion after state mutation (constant product, sum(user_deposit) == vault.total_deposit).

types.name: BALANCE_ACCOUNTING
types.description: Assertion that token/lamport inflows equal outflows plus fees.
markers: balance-before / balance-after deltas around CPI transfers
vault amount diff matches state.total_deposited diff

types.name: MISSING_OWNER_CHECK
types.description: An AccountInfo or UncheckedAccount is deserialized or trusted without verifying account.owner == expected_program_id.

types.name: MISSING_SIGNER_CHECK
types.description: Authority-dependent instruction where the supposed authority is not constrained to be a Signer.
markers: authority passed as AccountInfo or UncheckedAccount

types.name: MISSING_DISCRIMINATOR_CHECK
types.description: Account data deserialized without checking the 8-byte Anchor discriminator or a manual type tag.
markers: missing magic-number check in non-Anchor programs

types.name: ACCOUNT_ALIASING
types.description: Two or more mutable accounts in the same instruction are not constrained to be distinct.
markers: two Account<'info, T> fields both mut with no constraint = a.key() != b.key()

types.name: ACCOUNT_TYPE_CONFUSION
types.description: Same discriminator prefix or overlapping layout used by multiple account types so one can be substituted for another.
markers: manual discriminator assignment with reused constants
duplicate Account<T> sizes with similar leading fields

types.name: UNINITIALIZED_ACCOUNT_READ
types.description: Program reads account data before verifying the account has been initialized (all-zero state treated as valid).
markers: account.data_len() > 0 used as proxy for init

types.name: REINITIALIZATION_ATTACK
types.description: Account can be closed and re-initialized with attacker-controlled state, or init_if_needed silently reuses an existing account with residual data.

types.name: REMAINING_ACCOUNTS_INJECTION
types.description: ctx.remaining_accounts is iterated and used without per-account owner/type/signer/key-uniqueness validation.
markers: for acc in ctx.remaining_accounts with no owner check
no duplicate detection against named accounts

types.name: UNCHECKED_PDA_DERIVATION
types.description: PDA supplied by the caller is not verified via find_program_address or an Anchor seeds constraint.
markers: PDA as UncheckedAccount with no Pubkey::find_program_address comparison

types.name: SEED_COLLISION
types.description: Two PDA seed schemas can produce identical byte sequences, enabling one PDA to masquerade as another.
markers: variable-length user-controlled byte seed adjacent to static-length seed
shared b"data" prefix across account types

types.name: BUMP_NOT_STORED
types.description: Program re-derives a PDA on every access, recomputes bump inconsistently, or accepts user-supplied bump.
markers: no bump field on the PDA's account struct

types.name: CANONICAL_BUMP_MISSING
types.description: PDA created or signed with a non-canonical bump, or create_program_address with user bump rather than find_program_address.
markers: bump: u8 from ix data used in invoke_signed

types.name: PDA_AUTHORITY_LEAK
types.description: A PDA used as signer in invoke_signed also controls unrelated resources.
markers: single PDA seed schema signs transfers in both privileged and permissionless instructions
shared authority PDA across swap and emergency_withdraw

types.name: ATTACKER_CONTROLLED_SEEDS
types.description: PDA seeds include attacker-controlled bytes whose uniqueness or length is not bounded.

types.name: CPI_TARGET_UNCHECKED
types.description: Target program id for the CPI is not validated against a hardcoded constant.
markers: invoke with instruction.program_id from AccountInfo without require_keys_eq!

types.name: MISSING_SIGNER_SEEDS
types.description: invoke_signed uses empty or wrong signers_seeds, or authority PDA is not actually signing.
markers: mismatched bump with stored canonical bump

types.name: CPI_REENTRY_RISK
types.description: CPI target program may re-enter the caller while the caller holds a mutable borrow or has not yet updated state.
markers: CPI to program that can call back
nested CPI chains near 4-level depth limit
mutable account still in scope during CPI

types.name: CPI_RETURN_UNCHECKED
types.description: sol_get_return_data() is not read, or is read without verifying the returning program id matches expected target.
markers: CPI with expected return data but no get_return_data() call
assumption that empty return data means success

types.name: ACCOUNT_RELOAD_MISSING
types.description: After a CPI modifies an account, caller reads cached pre-CPI data without calling reload() or re-deserializing.
markers: post-CPI read of ctx.accounts.x.amount with no ctx.accounts.x.reload()?

types.name: ARBITRARY_CPI
types.description: Instruction forwards attacker-supplied program id and account list into invoke.
markers: routing loop over remaining_accounts with user-controlled program ids

types.name: CPI_OWNER_CHANGE
types.description: CPI target can call system_program::assign, changing the owner of an account the caller still treats as its own.
markers: trust in account.owner as stable across CPI

types.name: DIRECT_LAMPORT_ARITHMETIC
types.description: Program mutates account.lamports directly, bypassing system_program::transfer, potentially violating rent or conservation invariants.
markers: manual lamport movement between program-owned accounts without System Program CPI

types.name: RENT_EXEMPT_CHECK_MISSING
types.description: Account shrunk via realloc, or lamport withdrawn, without checking remaining balance still covers rent.
markers: account.realloc(new_len, false) with no Rent::get()?.minimum_balance(new_len) check
lamports -= amt followed by use of from account without rent check

types.name: REALLOC_NO_ZERO_FILL
types.description: realloc(new_len, false) used when growing an account, leaving stale residual bytes.
markers: missing zero-fill of the newly-extended region

types.name: RENT_SKIM_ON_CLOSE
types.description: Close handler drains lamports before the Anchor close = receiver mechanism or before setting discriminator to CLOSED sentinel.

types.name: SIZE_DISCREPANCY_ON_REALLOC
types.description: realloc length does not match the serialized size of the new struct, causing truncation or over-read.

types.name: CLOCK_DRIFT_ASSUMPTION
types.description: Program relies on Clock::unix_timestamp precision below validator-estimation drift, or treats it as strictly monotonic.
markers: cooldown windows shorter than ~5s keyed on unix_timestamp

types.name: SLOT_VS_UNIX_TIMESTAMP_CONFUSION
types.description: Program mixes Clock::slot and Clock::unix_timestamp for the same timing concept.
markers: config stores period_slots but handler reads unix_timestamp

types.name: SYSVAR_SHARED_READ
types.description: Same sysvar account (Clock, Rent, Instructions, SlotHashes, StakeHistory, EpochSchedule, RecentBlockhashes) read by multiple pieces as a shared trust anchor.
markers: SlotHashes read for randomness or ancestry

types.name: RECENT_BLOCKHASHES_MISUSE
types.description: Use of deprecated RecentBlockhashes sysvar (or SlotHashes) as a source of randomness without understanding validator influence.
markers: commit-reveal schemes keyed on last blockhash only

types.name: STAKE_HISTORY_ASSUMPTION
types.description: Staking logic that assumes StakeHistory is always current or available without validating the account.
markers: assumption of full activation/deactivation schedule coverage

types.name: SYSVAR_SPOOFING
types.description: Sysvar passed as raw AccountInfo with no address check, so an attacker passes a fake account.

types.name: MINT_AUTHORITY_UNVERIFIED
types.description: Program trusts a mint without checking mint.mint_authority matches the expected PDA or revoked state.

types.name: ATA_NOT_CANONICAL
types.description: Associated Token Account is not validated against the canonical get_associated_token_address.

types.name: TRANSFER_HOOK_IGNORED
types.description: Program interacts with a Token-2022 mint that may carry the TransferHook extension and does not account for CU or revert risk.

types.name: TRANSFER_FEE_IGNORED
types.description: Program assumes transfer_checked moves the gross amount; Token-2022 TransferFee extension deducts a fee.
markers: accounting uses gross amount after transfer_checked on a fee-bearing mint

types.name: FREEZE_AUTHORITY_IGNORED
types.description: Mint has a live freeze authority that can freeze protocol-owned ATAs or user ATAs, DoS'ing redemption / rewards.
markers: no allowlist of safe freeze-authority pubkeys

types.name: DECIMALS_ASSUMPTION
types.description: Program hardcodes decimals rather than reading mint.decimals, or uses one mint's decimals in arithmetic against another mint's amount.
markers: cross-mint math with single decimals constant

types.name: INTEREST_BEARING_IGNORED
types.description: Token-2022 InterestBearing extension means mint.supply / UI amount drifts over time; static-amount accounting treats it as flat.
markers: ExtensionType::InterestBearingConfig present but no amount_to_ui_amount usage
accounting on raw amount without interest factor

types.name: NON_TRANSFERABLE_IGNORED
types.description: NonTransferable extension prevents third-party transfer; protocol expects to move user tokens but will revert.
markers: DEX/vault that assumes it can always transfer custody

types.name: CONFIDENTIAL_TRANSFER_IGNORED
types.description: ConfidentialTransfer extension hides balances from direct reads; protocol that keys accounting off token_account.amount reads zero.
markers: direct token_account.amount usage on confidential-capable mints

types.name: PERMANENT_DELEGATE_PRESENT
types.description: Mint has PermanentDelegate extension that can transfer FROM any ATA of that mint without owner approval.
markers: vault PDA holds tokens of such a mint with no drain mitigation
no allowlist of trusted permanent delegates

types.name: MINT_CLOSE_AUTHORITY
types.description: Mint has MintCloseAuthority extension; mint can be closed and subsequent reads return zero decimals / supply.
markers: reads of mint.decimals / mint.supply without MintCloseAuthority-aware guard

types.name: DEFAULT_ACCOUNT_STATE_FROZEN
types.description: DefaultAccountState extension makes new ATAs start frozen; protocol's init-then-use pattern fails until a thaw.
markers: init_associated_token_account then immediately transfer without thaw handling

types.name: CPI_GUARD_VS_DELEGATION
types.description: User enabled CPI Guard on their token account; program relies on delegated CPI transfer, which fails silently or errors.
markers: missing fallback to direct signer transfer
